text: Based on the verified analysis, we assign a Hold rating to Amazon.com, Inc. (AMZN). The company demonstrates solid fundamental momentum with Q2 2025 revenue reaching $167.7 billion, representing 7.73% year-over-year growth that accelerated from Q1. Profitability metrics have improved meaningfully, with gross margin expanding to 51.81%, operating margin at 11.43%, and net margin at 10.83%. The balance sheet remains adequate with a current ratio of 1.02x and a conservative debt-to-equity ratio of 0.40x. However, free cash flow generation is severely constrained at only $332 million or 0.20% of revenue, as capital expenditures of $32.2 billion nearly consumed the quarter's operating cash flow. This capital intensity creates uncertainty about near-term shareholder return potential despite the company's strong top-line trajectory.
